overview.summary: SDU System State (SYSTEM_STATE) preserves health=YELLOW, sourceHealth=YELLOW, score=68, risk=HIGH, graphOk=True.

principles.name: State observation
principles.rationale: Risk is high from alert density while health is YELLOW and Graph is stable.

principles.name: NO ACTION REQUIRED
principles.rationale: Review WATCHDOG alerts or run check_alert_source through Start Dev if owner wants contextual confirmation.
